analysis.consistency: Consistent with standard D&D 5e feature naming and structure. The description clearly references the core mechanic of selecting a subclass (Bard College) at this level.
analysis.quality: High quality. It is concise, accurately describes when the feature is gained, and correctly points to the relevant section for the choice.
analysis.mechanics: This feature acts as a trigger point for subclass progression. The mechanic is standard: selection at 3rd level leading to further features at 6th and 14th level, reinforcing the established class progression path.
